label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this white elephant gift exchange problem. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The problem is to track the swaps and see what present Alice ends up with. Let me start by listing the initial presents: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: purple - Eve: pink ball Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me go through each swap step by step. Maybe I should track each person's present after each swap. First swap: Alice and Dave swap. So Alice had white, Dave had purple. After swapping: - Alice: purple - Dave: white Others remain the same: Bob (green), Claire (yellow), Eve (pink) Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. Dave has white, Claire has yellow. After swapping: - Claire: white - Dave: yellow Others: Alice (purple), Bob (green), Eve (pink) Third swap: Dave and Eve swap. Dave has yellow, Eve has pink. After swapping: - Dave: pink - Eve: yellow Others: Alice (purple), Bob (green), Claire (white) Fourth swap: Bob and Dave swap. Bob has green, Dave has pink. After swapping: - Bob: pink - Dave: green Others: Alice
